name: Our Estate Home Design Process Explained — West Hollywood
description: Learn about the complete Estate Home Design process at Opus Builders in West Hollywood. Opus Builders is a Los Angeles, California construction company offering residential and commercial design-build

step.name: Step 1: Project timeline
step.text: Project timeline — Opus Builders walks you through our Estate Home Design project timeline in West Hollywood. Opus Builders is a Los Angeles, California construction company offering residential and commercial design-build services, including custom luxury home construction, high-end renovations, and modern minimalist architectural design. Services include in-house design, project planning, and full construction management, providing end-to-end solutions for clients seeking high-quality, turnkey building projects.
